blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,690 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 41".
